info.title: Graph Italia API
info.description: API documentation for the Graph Italia application

get.description: List all users. Admin only.

delete.description: Delete a user by id. Admin only.

post.description: Force-activate (verify) a user account. Admin only.
Resend the activation email to an unverified user. Admin only.
Send a password reset email to a user. Admin only.

get.description: If the user is authenticated, returns the user information along with current token.

post.description: Register a new user with email and password.
Authenticate with email and password. Sets an access_token cookie on success.
Request a password reset email. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.
Re-send the activation email to an unverified user. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.

get.description: Clear the access_token cookie and log the user out.

post.description: Verify a user account using the PIN sent to their email.

get.description: Confirm email via link (redirects to app on success).

302.description: Redirect to app after successful confirmation

post.description: Reset password using a recovery code sent by email.

put.description: Change the current user's password. Requires an active session.

get.description: List all API keys for the current user across all accessible projects.

post.description: Create a new API key. The raw key is returned once and never shown again.

delete.description: Delete an API key by ID. Requires ADMIN or owner access on the key's project.

patch.description: Revoke an API key, disabling it without deleting it.
Reinstate a previously revoked API key.

get.description: Retrieve usage logs for a specific API key. Requires access to the key's project.

post.description: Create a new KPI group chart. Requires an authenticated user session (not API key).

403.description: Write access required or user auth required

put.description: Update a KPI group's config and data source items. Requires READWRITE access.

get.description: Get a KPI group by ID including its config and data source items.
List all dashboards for the caller's project (resolved from API key or user session).

post.description: Create a new dashboard in the caller's project. Requires READWRITE API key or user session.

get.description: Get a single dashboard by ID including its chart slots.

delete.description: Delete a dashboard by ID. Requires READWRITE access.

put.description: Update dashboard metadata (name, description, publish state). Requires READWRITE access.

get.description: Public endpoint — returns a published dashboard. No auth required.

put.description: Replace all chart slots for a dashboard. Requires READWRITE access.

get.description: List all data sources for the caller's project

post.description: Create a new data source in the caller's project

get.description: Get a single data source by id
List all charts linked to a data source

post.description: Link a chart to a data source

get.description: List all orgs the current user belongs to

post.description: Create a new org. The current user becomes its first ADMIN member.

get.description: Get a single org with its members and associated projects
List members of an org (members only)

post.description: Add a user to an org (ADMIN only)

get.description: List projects of an org (members only)

put.description: Update a member's role in an org (ADMIN only)

delete.description: Remove a member from an org (ADMIN only)

get.description: List all projects the current user owns or is a member of.

post.description: Create a new project. The current user becomes owner and ADMIN member automatically.

get.description: List projects owned by the current user that are not associated with any org.
Get a project by ID. Accessible to the owner and its members.

put.description: Rename a project. Requires ADMIN or owner access.

get.description: List members of a project. Requires ADMIN or owner access.

post.description: Add a user to a project. Requires ADMIN or owner access.

put.description: Change the role of a project member. Requires ADMIN or owner access.

delete.description: Remove a member from a project. Requires ADMIN or owner access.

post.description: Associate an org with a project. Requires ADMIN or owner access.

delete.description: Remove an org association from a project. Owner only.
